content.question:
Thanks.



Slide 4

   - Is the YOY numbers for JP and KR here correct?

For eg. 44% for ADO. It
   looks very different from the daily report.
   - Why did PC2 % drop so much MOM?
Seems like TR% got much worser MOM?

Slide 7

   - We probably will need a new set of OKRs
   - And ideally, we will break up the KR and JP OKR separately
   - For KR, there are some fundamentals we should look to improve including
      - New seller acquisition (new sellers to platform + existing sellers
      starting shops in more markets)
      - New category expansion (if applicable)
      - Campaign participation/Net Price Competitiveness/LFF
   - For JP,
      - New seller acquisition
      - Campaign participation
      - LFF (if applicable)



Slide 9

   - I like to understand the LFF % broken down by SMT 1/2/3
   - And amongst SMT 1/2/3 are there sellers that are outliers which we
   should identify to push into LFF?

Slide 11

   - #6 and #12 seems to remain an issue?
Does not seem to really improve?

Slide 13

   - Quite a few brands remain an issue
   - How are we pushing for sellers to move into LFF given tax issues?

Have
   we identified specific sellers from SMT 1/2/3 for the TH market that we
   should push into LFF?

Slide 16

   - What does the % actual ADGMV mean here?

What do we use for numerator
   and denominator?

- For TW, it seems ok, but why are so little of our SKUs being rebated
   vs Coupang?

Slide 20 -21

   - I cannot really understand what the targets mean here
   - I remember we wanted to push for F&B SKUs to acquire, how is that
   coming along?

- I remember we wanted to push for existing sellers (both in TW and
   outside TW) to onboard more SKUs into TW. How is that coming along?

- It is not quite clear to me the trend of new KR SKUs, new KR sellers
   broken down into categories for TW market. And how this has impacted the
   trend of ADO over time



Slide 22

   - Not quite sure what we are saying here, can go through in meeting
   - I need to understand if seller onboarding is on track, SKU onboarding
   is on track, campaign participation is on track etcetc
      - If it is on track, why is the ADO not flowing in
      - If it is not on track, what is the reason



Slide 26

   - Not quite clear to me. Are we comparing cost to seller here for FBS
   and SLS?
- Are we pushing for sellers to use FBS or 3PF?
- What is the difference in BWT?
- Are there tax savings as well on top of operational savings?

Slide 28 – 33

   - Which product fixes are critical that I should take note of?
- How is the progress of KR and JP SIP?

Slide 34

   - @Jason Yu <jason.yu@shopee.com> which markets are they complaining
   about?
